verdict_reasoning: LYN is a Src-family tyrosine kinase, canonically anchored to the inner leaflet of the PM via N-terminal myristoylation/palmitoylation — intracellular by baseline. However, LYN has documented ecto-display on the surface of tumor cells (notably hematologic malignancies and some solid tumors), part of the broader 'ecto-kinase' phenomenon where Src-family kinases appear on the outer leaflet of cancer cells. This cancer-cell-restricted ecto-pool qualifies as contextual surface accessibility.
